assembly_instructions: Pilotless two-seat passenger eVTOL. The car-like composite cabin sits high atop the rotor frame, on twin sled-style landing skids. Four V-shaped boom supports radiate outward from the cabin's lower-side corners (X pattern); each V forks into two horizontal arms, and each of the eight arm tips carries a coaxial pair of brushless motors with one propeller below the cabin floor and one between the cabin floor and skids — 16 rotors in total, all positioned in the lower portion of the airframe so the cabin volume sits visibly above the rotor disks. All major systems (power, propulsion, flight control, command-and-control link) are designed with full redundancy.

info.summary: Two-seat autonomous multirotor eVTOL air taxi from EHang — the world's first pilotless passenger-carrying aircraft to be granted a Type Certificate (CAAC, October 2023), followed by Production and Standard Airworthiness Certificates.
info.description: The EH216-S is a passenger-carrying autonomous aerial vehicle (AAV) developed by Guangzhou EHang Intelligent Technology. It is a true "drone-style" flying car: a car-like composite cabin seats two passengers under a panoramic windshield, with gull-wing doors and sled-style landing gear. Beneath the cabin floor, four V-shaped supports radiate outward from the cabin's lower-side corners in an X pattern; each V forks into two horizontal arms, and each of the eight arm tips mounts a coaxial pair of brushless motors driving fixed-pitch composite propellers — sixteen rotors in all, with the upper rotor disk sitting just below the cabin floor and the lower disk between the cabin floor and the skids, so the rotor structure occupies the lower third of the airframe envelope. There is no onboard pilot and no flight stick: passengers select a destination on a touchscreen and the aircraft executes a pre-cleared route under supervision from a ground command-and-control center. The Civil Aviation Administration of China (CAAC) accepted the type-certification application in January 2021 and issued the Type Certificate on 13 October 2023 — the world's first TC for a pilotless passenger-carrying eVTOL. A Production Certificate and a Standard Airworthiness Certificate followed in 2024, clearing the EH216-S for serial manufacture and commercial operation.
info.operator: EHang AAV operators (Guangzhou, Hefei, and other Chinese cities)
info.contractor: Guangzhou EHang Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
info.status: Type-, Production-, and Standard-Airworthiness-Certified by CAAC; in commercial service

facts.label: Control
facts.value: Pilotless; passenger touchscreen + ground command-and-control center

sources.title: EHang — Successfully Obtains CAAC Type Certificate for EH216-S (official, 2023-10-13)
EHang — Standard Airworthiness Certificate & Customer Delivery (official)

parts.name: Landing Skid (Port)
parts.role: Sled-style tubular composite landing skid, port side. Spreads ground load and absorbs touchdown energy.

parts.name: Landing Skid (Starboard)
parts.role: Sled-style tubular composite landing skid, starboard side.

parts.name: Skid Cross-Tube (Front)
parts.role: Forward cross-tube tying the two skids together.

parts.name: Skid Cross-Tube (Rear)
parts.role: Aft cross-tube tying the two skids together.

parts.name: Cabin Riser (Fwd-Port)
parts.role: Vertical riser between port skid and cabin floor (front).

parts.name: Cabin Riser (Aft-Port)
parts.role: Vertical riser between port skid and cabin floor (rear).

parts.name: Cabin Riser (Fwd-Stbd)
parts.role: Vertical riser between starboard skid and cabin floor (front).

parts.name: Cabin Riser (Aft-Stbd)
parts.role: Vertical riser between starboard skid and cabin floor (rear).

parts.name: Cabin Floor Pan
parts.role: Composite floor pan supporting the seats and cabin shell. The four V-supports bolt to its underside corners.

parts.name: Battery Pack
parts.role: Liquid-cooled lithium-polymer battery modules (independent power channels per motor for full redundancy). ≈2 h recharge.

parts.name: Cabin Fuselage
parts.role: Main composite cabin shell sitting atop the rotor frame — carbon-fibre monocoque housing the two-seat passenger compartment.

parts.name: Cabin Roof Canopy
parts.role: Curved composite roof cap atop the cabin fuselage.

parts.name: Nose Cap
parts.role: Streamlined forward fairing housing forward-looking radar and visual sensors.

parts.name: Tail Cap
parts.role: Streamlined aft fairing covering the avionics bay.

parts.name: Panoramic Windshield
parts.role: Curved panoramic windshield giving forward visibility for both passengers.

parts.name: Gull-Wing Door (Port)
parts.role: Upward-hinged gull-wing passenger door, port side.

parts.name: Gull-Wing Door (Starboard)
parts.role: Upward-hinged gull-wing passenger door, starboard side.

parts.name: Side Window (Port)
parts.role: Tinted side window in the port gull-wing door.

parts.name: Side Window (Starboard)
parts.role: Tinted side window in the starboard gull-wing door.

parts.name: Passenger Seat (Port)
parts.role: Port-side passenger seat with seatbelt anchorage.

parts.name: Passenger Seat (Stbd)
parts.role: Starboard-side passenger seat with seatbelt anchorage.

parts.name: Touchscreen Console
parts.role: 12-inch touchscreen console — passengers select destination here; aircraft autonomously executes the route.

parts.name: Avionics & Flight Control Bay
parts.role: Triple-redundant flight controller, IMU stack, GNSS receivers, and 4G/5G command-and-control link to ground center.

parts.name: V-Support Root (Fwd-Port)
parts.role: Structural attachment block on the cabin floor's forward-port underside corner; root of the forward-port V-shaped support.

parts.name: V-Support Root (Aft-Port)
parts.role: Structural attachment block on the cabin floor's aft-port underside corner; root of the aft-port V-shaped support.

parts.name: V-Support Root (Aft-Stbd)
parts.role: Structural attachment block on the cabin floor's aft-starboard underside corner; root of the aft-starboard V-shaped support.

parts.name: V-Support Root (Fwd-Stbd)
parts.role: Structural attachment block on the cabin floor's forward-starboard underside corner; root of the forward-starboard V-shaped support.

parts.name: V-Arm (Fwd-Port → fwd rotor)
parts.role: Forward fork of the forward-port V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 22.5°.

parts.name: V-Arm (Fwd-Port → side rotor)
parts.role: Outboard fork of the forward-port V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 67.5°.

parts.name: V-Arm (Aft-Port → side rotor)
parts.role: Outboard fork of the aft-port V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 112.5°.

parts.name: V-Arm (Aft-Port → aft rotor)
parts.role: Aft fork of the aft-port V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 157.5°.

parts.name: V-Arm (Aft-Stbd → aft rotor)
parts.role: Aft fork of the aft-starboard V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 202.5°.

parts.name: V-Arm (Aft-Stbd → side rotor)
parts.role: Outboard fork of the aft-starboard V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 247.5°.

parts.name: V-Arm (Fwd-Stbd → side rotor)
parts.role: Outboard fork of the forward-starboard V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 292.5°.

parts.name: V-Arm (Fwd-Stbd → fwd rotor)
parts.role: Forward fork of the forward-starboard V-support; carries the coaxial motor pair at 337.5°.

parts.name: Motor #1 (22.5°, upper)
parts.role: Brushless DC outrunner, upper of the coaxial pair at 22.5° (forward-port quadrant, forward fork). Drives the upper prop just below the cabin floor.

parts.name: Motor #2 (22.5°, lower)
parts.role: Brushless DC outrunner, lower of the coaxial pair at 22.5°. Drives the lower prop above the skids.

parts.name: Motor #3 (67.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper of the coaxial pair at 67.5° (forward-port quadrant, outboard fork).

parts.name: Motor #4 (67.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower of the coaxial pair at 67.5°.

parts.name: Motor #5 (112.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper of the coaxial pair at 112.5° (aft-port quadrant, outboard fork).

parts.name: Motor #6 (112.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower of the coaxial pair at 112.5°.

parts.name: Motor #7 (157.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper of the coaxial pair at 157.5° (aft-port quadrant, aft fork).

parts.name: Motor #8 (157.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower of the coaxial pair at 157.5°.

parts.name: Motor #9 (202.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper of the coaxial pair at 202.5° (aft-stbd quadrant, aft fork).

parts.name: Motor #10 (202.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower of the coaxial pair at 202.5°.

parts.name: Motor #11 (247.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper of the coaxial pair at 247.5° (aft-stbd quadrant, outboard fork).

parts.name: Motor #12 (247.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower of the coaxial pair at 247.5°.

parts.name: Motor #13 (292.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper of the coaxial pair at 292.5° (forward-stbd quadrant, outboard fork).

parts.name: Motor #14 (292.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower of the coaxial pair at 292.5°.

parts.name: Motor #15 (337.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper of the coaxial pair at 337.5° (forward-stbd quadrant, forward fork).

parts.name: Motor #16 (337.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower of the coaxial pair at 337.5°.

parts.name: Propeller #1 (22.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper fixed-pitch composite propeller of the 22.5° coaxial pair — sweeps just below the cabin floor.

parts.name: Propeller #2 (22.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower fixed-pitch composite propeller of the 22.5° coaxial pair — sweeps between the cabin floor and the skids.

parts.name: Propeller #3 (67.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper composite propeller of the 67.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #4 (67.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower composite propeller of the 67.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #5 (112.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper composite propeller of the 112.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #6 (112.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower composite propeller of the 112.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #7 (157.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper composite propeller of the 157.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #8 (157.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower composite propeller of the 157.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #9 (202.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper composite propeller of the 202.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #10 (202.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower composite propeller of the 202.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #11 (247.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper composite propeller of the 247.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #12 (247.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower composite propeller of the 247.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #13 (292.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper composite propeller of the 292.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #14 (292.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower composite propeller of the 292.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #15 (337.5°, upper)
parts.role: Upper composite propeller of the 337.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Propeller #16 (337.5°, lower)
parts.role: Lower composite propeller of the 337.5° coaxial pair.

parts.name: Command-Link Antenna
parts.role: 4G/5G command-and-control link antenna to the EHang ground command center.

parts.name: Anti-Collision Strobe
parts.role: White anti-collision strobe atop the cabin canopy.

parts.name: Navigation Light (Port, red)
parts.role: Red port navigation light at the outermost port arm tip.

parts.name: Navigation Light (Stbd, green)
parts.role: Green starboard navigation light at the outermost starboard arm tip.
